title: fimbristylis calcicola
intro: Fimbristylis calcicola, also known as coastal hair sedge, is a type of plant species that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fimbristylis calcicola include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
